SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold

Class DividedMold1

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entity
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.ProximalMold
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.DividedMold1
All Implemented Interfaces:
CanAge, CanGrow, CanPropagate, Displayable, Serializable
public class DividedMold1 extends ProximalMold
A concrete mold that propagates by splitting its growth between itself and the target cell. If the target cell already contains a DividedMold1, the propagation instead absorbs up to 100 growth units from the source mold and transfers them to the existing mold.

This mold is a subtype of ProximalMold and uses its default proximal propagation distribution.

See Also:
  • ProximalMold
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • DividedMold1

      public DividedMold1()
      Constructs a DividedMold1 with parameters tuned for very slow ageing.
      • initial growth: 0
      • growth rate: 3
      • minimum growth for propagation: 100
      • propagation rate: 0.4
      • entity type: Entities.DIVIDED_MOLD1
      • age death factor: 0.00007 (extremely low)
      • age death max: 0.5

  • Method Details

    • getPropagationDistributionList

      public List<CoorWeight> getPropagationDistributionList()

      The returned list is the static, unmodifiable list of weighted proximal targets shared across all instances.

      Specified by:
      getPropagationDistributionList in interface CanPropagate
      Overrides:
      getPropagationDistributionList in class ProximalMold
      Returns:
      the proximal propagation distribution

    • getColorHex

      public String getColorHex()
      Returns:
      the hexadecimal color string (e.g., "#RRGGBB")

    • propagateTo

      public void propagateTo(Cell targetCell)
      Propagates this mold to the specified target cell.

      If the target cell already contains a DividedMold1, the propagation does not create a new mold; instead it transfers up to 100 growth units from this mold to the existing one, provided the cell has remaining capacity.

      If the target cell does not contain this mold type, a new DividedMold1 is created and half of this mold's growth (at least 1 unit) is transferred to the new mold. The new mold is then added to the target cell.

      Parameters:
      targetCell - the cell to propagate into; must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if targetCell is null

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      the string "S"
